title: ECIL Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: ECIL Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ECIL Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Kanpur-based team.

About ECIL Holdings Services:
ECIL Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL Holdings Services!
